testcase.name: test_write_planner[adjust_inventory]

failure.message:
AssertionError: adjust_inventory did not yield plan: keys=['action', 'reply', 'cards', 'plan', 'mode', 'intent', 'confidence', 'kg_matches'] assert ('answer' == 'plan'
- plan + answer or None)

testcase.failure:
E AssertionError: adjust_inventory did not yield plan: keys=['action', 'reply', 'cards', 'plan', 'mode', 'intent', 'confidence', 'kg_matches'] assert ('answer' == 'plan'
- plan + answer or None)

testcase.name: test_approve_create_blog_post

failure.message: AssertionError: approve failed: {'action': 'approve_plan', 'ok': False, 'error': "SQLSTATE[01000]: Warning: 1265 Data truncated for column 'category' at row 1"} assert (False in (True, 1) or None == 'ok') + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb4da5839240>('ok') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb4da5839240> = {'action': 'approve_plan', 'error': "SQLSTATE[01000]: Warning: 1265 Data truncated for column 'category' at row 1", 'ok': False}.get + and None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb4da5839240>('status') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb4da5839240> = {'action': 'approve_plan', 'error': "SQLSTATE[01000]: Warning: 1265 Data truncated for column 'category' at row 1", 'ok': False}.get
